title: Supply Chain Manager - DB Schenker India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DB Schenker India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
